questions.question: In a face-centred cubic (FCC) unit cell, the number of atoms per unit cell is:
questions.explanation: FCC: 8 corner atoms × (1/8) + 6 face atoms × (1/2) = 1 + 3 = 4 atoms per unit cell.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: Schottky defect in ionic crystals involves:
options: Equal numbers of cation and anion vacancies
questions.explanation: Schottky defect: equal numbers of cations and anions are missing from lattice sites, maintaining electrical neutrality. Density decreases.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: The coordination number of Na⁺ in NaCl crystal is:
questions.explanation: In the NaCl (rock salt) structure, each Na⁺ is surrounded by 6 Cl⁻ ions and vice versa. Coordination number = 6.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: Metallic solids are good conductors of electricity because:
options: They have sea of free electrons
They have van der Waals forces
questions.explanation: In metallic solids, outer electrons are delocalised and form a 'sea' of free electrons that can move freely, making metals good conductors.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: The packing efficiency of simple cubic structure is approximately:
questions.explanation: Simple cubic packing efficiency = (π/6) × 100 ≈ 52.4%. It has only one atom per unit cell with atoms touching along cube edges.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: Which type of solid has the highest melting point?
questions.explanation: Covalent network solids (like diamond, quartz) have strong covalent bonds throughout the crystal, giving them the highest melting points.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: Frenkel defect is NOT found in AgCl because:
options: Ag⁺ ions can fit in interstitial sites
questions.explanation: Frenkel defect occurs when smaller ions can fit into interstitial sites. In AgCl, Ag⁺ ions are small enough to move to interstitial sites.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: In body-centred cubic (BCC) structure, the radius to edge length ratio is:
questions.explanation: In BCC, atoms touch along the body diagonal. Body diagonal = 4r = a√3, so r = a√3/4.
questions.subject: Chemistry
